Index.title: International Business Center
Index.desc: Modern offices, convenient infrastructure and a prestigious address in the heart of the capital.

LocationSection.title: Our Location
LocationSection.description: Tashkent City International Business Center is not just a modern office building, but an entire ecosystem created for business. In our center, you will find not only a workplace, but also high-level amenities, innovative technologies and a professional community.

officeRental.title: Office Space Rental
officeRental.desc: Modern and bright offices with all amenities.

conferenceRooms.title: Conference Rooms
conferenceRooms.desc: Fully equipped luxurious halls for your events.

virtualOffice.title: Virtual Office Services
virtualOffice.desc: Providing an address for the official status of your business.

VideoBioSection.title: Brief bio about the center
VideoBioSection.description: The Open Joint Stock Company "International Business Center" is a modern facility located in the heart of our capital. We not only lease office spaces at a high standard, but also provide complete work infrastructure for the most demanding international companies.

WhyChooseUsSection.title: Why choose IBC?
WhyChooseUsSection.subtitle: The highest level of conditions have been created for the stability and peace of your business.

businessHome.title: Home of your success
businessHome.desc: The most prestigious and beautiful building for your business.

security.title: Systematic security
security.desc: Access control, internal patrol and 24/7 protection by the National Guard of Uzbekistan.

conference.title: Spacious conference rooms
conference.desc: Fully equipped premium area for negotiations, meetings and events.

parking.title: Underground parking
parking.desc: Spacious, secure and convenient parking area for you and your clients.
